view.title: Tiro Pae Tukutuku {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te tono anō i te īmēra whakamihi?
view.emailSentMessage: Kua tukuna anō te īmēra whakamihi. Tirohia tō pouaka tomo.

buyIp.title: Hoko Āpitihanga IP Tāpiri
buyIp.costDescription: Utu ({symbol}) ia marama ina utua tō pae tukutuku
buyIp.confirmMessage: Utu IP tāpiri: {symbol}{cost}/marama. He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te ota i tētahi IP tāpiri?

migration.title: Neke Tō Pae Tukutuku
migration.registeredUsername: Ingoa Kaiwhakamahi / Īmēra / ID Kua Rēhitatia
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Ki te kei ora / mahi tonu te pae me te tikanga nui, ka taea e mātou te tautuhia he whārangi pupuri i te wā o te nekehanga?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: He whakahau motuhake tō tēnei pae pēnei i te Putanga PHP / Ngā Pūranga?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Ka hiahia ana koe ki a mātou ki te āwhina i tō whakawhiti i te rēhitatanga ingoa rohe?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Ka hiahia ana koe ki a mātou ki te whakahōu i ngā tūmau ingoa i a mātou e mutu ana i te nekehanga raraunga?
migration.note1: Ko te whakakī i tēnei puka ka whakatuwhera i tētahi tikiti hou mō tō mātou tari tautoko ki te tīmata i tō nekehanga.
migration.note2: Tāriria kia oti pai ā tika tonu hei ārai i ngā tārewa.
migration.note3: Ka oti tūāhuatia tētahi nekehanga auau i roto i ngā hāora 48 ki te 72. I ētahi wā he roa ake ki te nui o ngā raraunga ka tāruaruatia.
migration.note4: Me noho tonu te pūkete manaaki tawhito ā me āhei ki te uru i a mātou e mahi ana i te nekehanga, kāo ake ka āhei ana mātou ki te pāhekoheko.
migration.note5: Tāriria kaua e whakahōu i tō pae i a mātou e mahi ana i te nekehanga, kāo ake ko ērā raraunga pea kāore e tāruaruatia ki te manaaki hou.
